name: Airtable Audit Log Event
description: An audit log event recording an action performed within an Airtable enterprise account. Events capture who performed what action, on which resource, and when, for compliance and security monitoring purposes.

id.description: The unique identifier for the audit log event.

timestamp.description: The exact date and time when the action was logged, in ISO 8601 format.

action.description: The type of action that was performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted, viewed, shared).

actor.description: The entity that performed the action.

type.description: The type of actor that initiated the action.

userId.description: The ID of the user who performed the action. Null for system or anonymous actors.

email.description: The email of the user who performed the action.

name.description: The display name of the actor.

modelId.description: The ID of the model (base, table, field, record, view, etc.) that was affected by the action.

modelType.description: The type of model affected by the action.

category.description: The category of the event for organizational and filtering purposes.

context.description: Additional context about the event, including related resource identifiers and request metadata.

baseId.description: The ID of the base where the event occurred.

tableId.description: The ID of the table where the event occurred.

viewId.description: The ID of the view involved in the event.

workspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace where the event occurred.

interfaceId.description: The ID of the interface involved in the event.

actionId.description: A unique identifier for the specific action taken.

ipAddress.description: The IP address from which the action was performed.

payloadVersion.description: The version of the event payload format.
